person.name: Lady Hawise FitzWarin Baroness Hoo

burialPlace.address: Church of the Greyfriars, Dunstable, Bedfordshire, England

person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
«b»Biography«/b»
She married Sir Ralph de Goushill, Lord Camoys Manor, son of Sir Piers de Goushill and Ela de Camoys, before 1294; 
«b»They had:«/b»
1.) Margaret de Goushill b. 12 May 1294, d. 29 Jul 1349, wife of Sir Philip de Despenser, & of John de Roos, Lord Roos of Watton.

Hawise FitzWarin married Sir Robert de Hoo, son of Sir Robert de Hoo and Beatrice d' Andeville, after 30 August 1294.
1.) Sir Thomas de Hoo, Sheriff of Surrey & Sussexd. 18 Sep 1380

Hawise FitzWarin died on 2 September 1344; Buried in the church of the Grey Friars, Dunstable, Bedfordshire.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Hawise FitzWarin Baroness Hoo於1277年2月25日出生在英國史洛普爾廷頓時，她的父親Fulk FitzWarin 1st Baron FitzWarin25歲，母親Margaret de la Pole20歲。她於1294年1月30日與Ralph de Goushill在英國英格蘭史洛普爾廷頓結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1344年9月2日在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾登斯比享年67歲，埋葬在英國貝德福爾登斯塔波。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Hawise FitzWarin Baroness Hoo于1277年2月25日出生在英国史洛普爾廷頓时，她的父亲Fulk FitzWarin 1st Baron FitzWarin25岁，母亲Margaret de la Pole20岁。她于1294年1月30日与Ralph de Goushill在英国英格兰史洛普爾廷頓结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1344年9月2日在英国英格兰林可爾史爾登斯比享年67岁，埋葬在英国貝德福爾登斯塔波。

nameMeanings.name: Hawise
meanings: This female name (which has been corrupted down to Avice and Avis) is from Hadewisa, formed from the German name Hedvig, same as Edwig, which Wachter translates 'propugnator felicitatis;' say, 'fortunate soldier.'

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Hawise FitzWarin Baroness Hoo was born on 25 February 1277, in Whittington, Shropshire, England, her father, Fulk FitzWarin 1st Baron FitzWarin, was 25 and her mother, Margaret de la Pole, was 20. She married Ralph de Goushill on 30 January 1294, in Whittington, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 2 September 1344, in Dunsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 67, and was buried in Dunstable, Bedfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Hawise FitzWarin Baroness Hoo est née le 25 février 1277, à Whittington, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Fulk FitzWarin 1st Baron FitzWarin, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Margaret de la Pole, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Ralph de Goushill le 30 janvier 1294, à Whittington, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 2 septembre 1344, à Dunsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterrée à Dunstable, Bedfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Hawise FitzWarin Baroness Hoo am 25. Februar 1277 in Whittington, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Fulk FitzWarin 1st Baron FitzWarin 25 und ihre Mutter Margaret de la Pole 20. Sie hat am 30. Januar 1294 in Whittington, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom Ralph de Goushill geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 2. September 1344 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Dunsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Dunstable, Bedfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Hawise FitzWarin Baroness Hoo è nata il il 25 febbraio 1277 nel Whittington, Shropshire, England, sua padre, Fulk FitzWarin 1st Baron FitzWarin, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Margaret de la Pole, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Ralph de Goushill il 30 gennaio 1294, nel Whittington, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 2 settembre 1344, nel Dunsby, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolta a Dunstable, Bedfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Hawise FitzWarin Baroness Hooが1277年2月25日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアウィッティントンで生まれた時，父Fulk FitzWarin 1st Baron FitzWarinは25歳，母Margaret de la Poleは20歳であった。1294年1月30日にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアウィッティントンでRalph de Goushillと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1344年9月2日にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアダンスビーで67歳で死去し，イギリスベドフォードシュアイアダンスタブルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Hawise FitzWarin Baroness Hoo(이)가 1277년 2월 25일 영국 슈럽실르 휘틴그턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Fulk FitzWarin 1st Baron FitzWarin(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de la Pole(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1294년 1월 30일 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 휘틴그턴에서 Ralph de Goushill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1344년 9월 2일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 던스비에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 베드퍼드실르 던스타블일에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Hawise FitzWarin Baroness Hoo nasceu em 25 de fevereiro de 1277, em Whittington, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Fulk FitzWarin 1st Baron FitzWarin, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de la Pole, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Ralph de Goushill em 30 de janeiro de 1294, em Whittington, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 2 de setembro de 1344, em Dunsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 67 anos, e foi sepultada em Dunstable, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Hawise FitzWarin Baroness Hoo родилась 25 февраля 1277 г. в местности уиттингтон, шропшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Fulk FitzWarin 1st Baron FitzWarin было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de la Pole, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralph de Goushill 30 января 1294 г. в местности уиттингтон, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 2 сентября 1344 г. в местности дунсби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 67 лет и была похоронена в местности дунстабл, бедфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Hawise FitzWarin Baroness Hoo nació el 25 de febrero de 1277, en Whittington, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Fulk FitzWarin 1st Baron FitzWarin, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Margaret de la Pole, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Ralph de Goushill el 30 de enero de 1294, en Whittington, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 2 de septiembre de 1344, en Dunsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultada en Dunstable, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra.
